_comment: Single source of truth for EazyWeek license tiers. Keep the frontend copy (src/config) and backend copy (src/middlewares) identical.

appointment.label: Appointment Booking & Scheduling
appointment.blurb: Book, reschedule and manage appointments across your centres.

emr.label: EMR & Treatment Forms
emr.blurb: Digital treatment records and customisable clinical forms.

customer360.label: Customer 360 & CRM
customer360.blurb: A unified view of every customer's history and activity.

loyalty.label: Loyalty Management
loyalty.blurb: Points, tiers and rewards to keep customers coming back.

membership.label: Membership Management
membership.blurb: Paid membership programs with member pricing and benefits.

opportunity.label: Lead & Opportunity Management
opportunity.blurb: Capture, assign and convert leads through your sales pipeline.

reporting.label: Advanced Reporting & Dashboards
reporting.blurb: Detailed reports and executive dashboards across modules.

multiLocation.label: Multi-location Governance
multiLocation.blurb: Zones and organisation hierarchy for managing multiple centres.

audit.label: Audit Management
audit.blurb: Quality audits against segments, criteria and scoring.

caseManagement.label: Case Management
caseManagement.blurb: Track, assign, escalate and resolve customer cases.

courtesyCall.label: Courtesy Call / Service Quality
courtesyCall.blurb: Post-visit follow-up calls and service-quality tracking.
